facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this place in Ông Lang. 4.7 stars. 1,165 reviews. A treehouse restaurant that actually sits in the trees. Tree House Phu Quoc Restaurant and Coffee is on the quieter west coast, away from the resort strip. $15-30 a person for a full meal up in the canopy. Not on most itineraries. Should be on yours. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Climbing up to your table at Tree House Phu Quoc Restaurant and Coffee. West coast, Ông Lang, away from the crowds. 4.7 stars and barely on the tourist radar. Your lunch spot just got an upgrade.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past this in Ông Lang. 4.7 stars, 1,165 reviews, tables literally in the trees. Tree House Phu Quoc. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Your table is up in the canopy. Tree House Phu Quoc, Ông Lang. 4.7 stars and most tourists never find it.
